purpose: Allow customers and third-party factory auditors to review delivery capability without exposing confidential customer identity, pricing, margin, contact, or order-level commercial terms.

input_scope.description: The AI report generator receives one confidential raw business snapshot. Both the full internal report and the redacted public report are derived from this same input.

quantity_bucket_policy.example: 238000 units may be disclosed as 200000-250000 units
